are a professional [Namibian football](/wiki/Football_in_Namibia "Football in Namibia") club from [Windhoek](/wiki/Windhoek "Windhoek"). They play in the country's highest division, the [Namibia Premiership](/wiki/Namibia_Premiership "Namibia Premiership").

+ Champions (3): [2022–23](/wiki/2022%E2%80%9323_Namibia_Premier_Football_League "2022–23 Namibia Premier Football League"), [2023–24](/wiki/2023%E2%80%9324_Namibia_Premiership "2023–24 Namibia Premiership"), [2024–25](/wiki/2024%E2%80%9325_Namibia_Premiership "2024–25 Namibia Premiership")[[1]](#cite_note-1)

Namibian football club

African Stars FC

The **African Stars Football Club** are a professional [Namibian football](/wiki/Football_in_Namibia "Football in Namibia") club from [Windhoek](/wiki/Windhoek "Windhoek"). They play in the country's highest division, the [Namibia Premiership](/wiki/Namibia_Premiership "Namibia Premiership").

## Achievements

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=African_Stars_F.C.&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Achievements")]

* **[Namibia Premiership](/wiki/Namibia_Premiership "Namibia Premiership")**
  + Champions (3): [2022–23](/wiki/2022%E2%80%9323_Namibia_Premier_Football_League "2022–23 Namibia Premier Football League"), [2023–24](/wiki/2023%E2%80%9324_Namibia_Premiership "2023–24 Namibia Premiership"), [2024–25](/wiki/2024%E2%80%9325_Namibia_Premiership "2024–25 Namibia Premiership")[[1]](#cite_note-1)
* **[Namibia Premier League](/wiki/Namibia_Premier_League "Namibia Premier League")**
  + Champions (5): 1994, 2008–09, 2009–10, 2014–15, 2017–18
* **[Namibian Cup](/wiki/NFA-Cup "NFA-Cup")**
  + Champions (6): 2007, 2010, 2013, 2014, 2018, 2024
* **Standard Bank Cup**
  + Champions (1): 2015
  + Runners-up (1): 2014
* **Dr. [Hage Geingob](/wiki/Hage_Geingob "Hage Geingob") Cup**
  + Runners-up (1): 2014, 2015,2022
  + Third place (1): 2016

## Performance in CAF competitions

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=African_Stars_F.C.&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Performance in CAF competitions")]

* **[CAF Champions League](/wiki/CAF_Champions_League "CAF Champions League"): 2 appearances**

:   :   [2019](/wiki/2018-19_CAF_Champions_League "2018-19 CAF Champions League") – first round
    :   [2020](/wiki/2019-20_CAF_Champions_League "2019-20 CAF Champions League") – preliminary round

* **[CAF Confederation Cup](/wiki/CAF_Confederation_Cup "CAF Confederation Cup"): 1 appearance**

:   :   [2014](/wiki/2014_CAF_Confederation_Cup "2014 CAF Confederation Cup") – preliminary round

* **[CAF Cup](/wiki/CAF_Cup "CAF Cup"): 1 appearance**

:   :   [1992](/wiki/1992_CAF_Cup "1992 CAF Cup") – first round
